summary: Phase 4 SpaceUI testing complete. All backend APIs (per-example loadstring, versioned loadstring, version, stats) working correctly. All frontend features (search palette, version toggle, stats display, one-liner install blocks) working. Mobile responsive. Strict grayscale preserved. No console errors.
seed_data_creation: MongoDB stats collection seeded on startup with {_id:'spaceui_loads', count:0}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 complete. All adoption & polish features working. Backend endpoints: /api/examples/{id}.lua (per-example loadstring), /api/spaceui@{version}.lua (versioned loadstring), /api/version (returns {latest:'1.0.0', available:['1.0.0']}), /api/stats (returns {loads:<int>} from MongoDB). Frontend: Search palette (Ctrl+K, navbar pill, mobile icon), version toggle (Pin this version/Use latest), stats display (Loaded N times with en-US formatting), one-liner install blocks on examples page. All Phase 1/2/3 features intact.

backend: GET /api/examples/hello-world.lua returns 200 text/plain with SpaceUI code
GET /api/spaceui@1.0.0.lua returns 200 text/plain starting with '--[[ SpaceUI v1.0.0'
frontend: Home page shows version line with 'Stable · v1.0.0'
Home page shows 'Pin this version' button
Clicking 'Pin this version' changes loadstring to include @1.0.0 and button to 'Use latest'
Home page shows 'Loaded N times' with en-US comma formatting
Stats slot has min-height 18px (no layout shift)
Mobile has Search icon button (data-testid nav-search-btn-mobile)
Examples page: each card has one-liner install block (data-testid example-{id}-oneliner-block)
Examples page: Copy script and View code buttons still work
Mobile (390x844): palette opens full width, no horizontal scroll
Strict grayscale preserved - no purple/blue/green in any UI
